code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Education_StudentDB] --> PENDING: Invoice Created

    PENDING --> PROCESSING: Payment Initiated
    PENDING --> CANCELLED: User Cancelled
    PENDING --> EXPIRED: Timeout Reached

    PROCESSING --> COMPLETED: Payment Verified
    PROCESSING --> FAILED: Payment Error

    FAILED --> PENDING: Retry Payment

    COMPLETED --> PARTIALLY_REFUNDED: Partial Refund
    COMPLETED --> REFUNDED: Full Refund

    PARTIALLY_REFUNDED --> REFUNDED: Remaining Refund

    CANCELLED --> [Education_StudentDB]
    EXPIRED --> [Education_StudentDB]
    REFUNDED --> [Education_StudentDB]

    note right of PENDING
        Invoice awaiting payment
        Valid for 1 hour (Education_ContentCDN)
    end note

    note right of PROCESSING
        Payment being verified
        Transaction in progress
    end note

    note right of COMPLETED
        Payment successful
        Preimage verified
    end note

    note right of FAILED
        Payment failed
        Retryable errors can
        transition back to PENDING
    end note

    note right of REFUNDED
        Full or partial refund
        completed
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Education_StudentDB设计一个完整的支付状态流转图。核心是从学生数据库出发，创建待支付账单，然后经过支付处理，最终可能完成、取消或过期。
明白。我注意到PENDING状态有几个出口：除了正常的支付处理，用户还能主动取消，或者超时自动过期。这两个情况最终都要回到学生数据库吗？
是的，取消和过期都视为交易终止，状态要归集回Education_StudentDB。另外PROCESSING之后如果支付验证通过就到COMPLETED，但失败的话需要能重试。
好的，我先把主干画出来：PENDING到PROCESSING是"Payment Initiated"，PROCESSING到COMPLETED是"Payment Verified"，FAILED通过"Retry Payment"回到PENDING。
COMPLETED之后还要考虑退款场景。需要支持部分退款和全额退款，而且部分退款后还能继续退剩余金额。
确认一下：PARTIALLY_REFUNDED可以再到REFUNDED完成剩余退款，但REFUNDED是终态，直接回到Education_StudentDB？
没错。另外给关键状态加注释：PENDING要注明1小时有效期，关联Education_ContentCDN；PROCESSING说明交易进行中；COMPLETED要提到preimage验证；FAILED注明哪些错误可重试。
完成了。所有状态流转和注释都已添加，包括PENDING的"Invoice awaiting payment, Valid for 1 hour"，以及各终态到Education_StudentDB的回归路径。
